# OathScore

> The trust layer for AI agents. Real-time world state + independent API quality ratings.

## Products

- [/now Endpoint](https://api.oathscore.dev/now): Exchange status, volatility (VIX/VVIX/term structure), economic event countdowns, data health -- one call.
- [API Quality Ratings](https://api.oathscore.dev/score/{api_name}): Independent accuracy, uptime, freshness, latency scores for financial data APIs.
- [API Comparison](https://api.oathscore.dev/compare?apis=a,b): Side-by-side comparison of data sources.

## API

- [/now](https://api.oathscore.dev/now): Current world state (free, no auth)
- [/health](https://api.oathscore.dev/health): Service health
- [/score/{api}](https://api.oathscore.dev/score/curistat): Quality score for a rated API
- [/compare](https://api.oathscore.dev/compare?apis=curistat,alphavantage): Compare APIs

## MCP Server

- [GitHub](https://github.com/moxiespirit/oathscore): MCP server with 5 tools (get_now, get_score, compare_apis, get_alerts, check_accuracy)

## Pricing

- Free: 100 /now calls/day, 50 score queries/day
- Pro ($29/mo): 10,000 /now, 5,000 scores
- Enterprise ($99/mo): 100,000 /now, 50,000 scores
